name: Jianying Auto Editor
description: Scan local media, request cloud editing plans, and generate Jianying-oriented draft output packages.

api_base_url.description: Base URL for the cloud editing API.

api_key.description: API key used for Authorization header.

project_type.description: High-level project type, such as short-video or product-demo.

aspect_ratio.description: Target aspect ratio, for example 9:16 or 16:9.

material_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the local media folder.

subtitle_mode.description: Subtitle strategy requested from the cloud service.

output_mode.description: Logical output mode label for the task.

jianying_draft_path.description: Destination directory for generated Jianying draft files.

draft_version.description: Target Jianying draft schema or version label.

export_mode.description: Whether to overwrite a single directory or create a task-specific subdirectory.

installRequirements: Network access to the configured cloud API
Write access to the configured Jianying draft directory
